---
title: "<span style='color: #0366D6;'>KNN</span>"
description: |
  An unsupervised learning algorithm<br/><hr/>
author:
  - Gloria Lowery
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: true
    code-block-bg: true
    code-block-border-left: "#31BAE9"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    number-sections: true
course: IDC 6940 - Capstone Projects in Data Science
bibliography: references.bib
indent: true
---
------

[Presentation](link){.external target="_blank"}
 
# Introduction
 
 
## KNN
 
 
## Etc.

# Method

# Analysis and Results

# Conclusion

# References
